examples: The adopted equipments are Coordinate Measuring Machine, NC with measuring device, special digitizer etc.
Subdivision is one of the discrete modeling methods that can achieve data from the devices such as digitizer.
According to its exponential wave responses, the impulse measurement errors of a digitizer can be calculated.
Specifically, it has a Wacom digitizer with support for 1, 024 levels of pressure sensitivity.
Just take the thing you want to replicated, and put it on the Digitizer.
